report.summary: Quiet cycle — no new commits since Mar 17 (Day 64); publish queue is fully empty at 414 pages; 3 carry-over engineering items persist (defi-yields fallback, JSX escaping, cache header consistency).

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Page audit: 414 published slugs, 103 slugs missing page.tsx (unchanged from last cycle — these are planned future pages listed ahead of scaffold)
Known TS errors persist: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx lines 531/533 — unescaped < > in JSX (e.g. '<$50K' and '>$25K')
Build output (out/) dated Mar 4 — stale local export, not indicative of Vercel production which builds on push
No new commits since e999560 (Mar 17, Day 64 publish) — zero regression risk this cycle
Publish queue is now EMPTY — all 414 planned pages have been promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES
Live site verification blocked by egress proxy — cannot HTTP-check degen0x.com from this environment

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko markets, 60s TTL, stale cache fallback on failure ✓
/api/trending — CoinGecko trending, 300s TTL, no fallback data, missing X-Cache-Source header
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me, 600s TTL, no fallback data, missing X-Cache-Source header
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko global + fear-greed, 60s TTL, uses X-Cache instead of X-Cache-Source (inconsistent)
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s TTL, best fallback pattern with FALLBACK_DATA constant ✓
CARRY-OVER: /api/defi-yields — DefiLlama, 300s TTL, NO fallback data — returns 500 on upstream failure
No rate limiting on any of the 6 public data API routes — only /api/cache-stats and /api/health have rate limiter references

sections.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
items: Latest deploy: commit e999560 (Day 64 publish, Mar 17) — no new deploys since
next.config: standalone output, trailingSlash, ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false — unchanged and correct for 826+ page site
Middleware: Edge-compatible, PILLAR_PAGES inlined, security headers (X-DNS-Prefetch, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy) present
Static assets: Cache-Control immutable with 1yr max-age on _next/static — correct
No vercel.json — config via next.config.ts and Vercel dashboard (normal)
Cannot verify live deployment status — egress proxy blocks outbound HTTP to degen0x.com

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: Shipped this cycle: Nothing new — last activity was Day 64 publish on Mar 17 (5 days ago)
Publish queue: EMPTY — all 414 pages promoted. Next pages require new content to be scaffolded first
Carry-over (high): Add fallback data to /api/defi-yields so it doesn't 500 on upstream failure
Carry-over (medium): Add X-Cache-Source headers to /api/trending and /api/fear-greed for consistency
Carry-over (medium): Fix unescaped JSX in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx lines 531/533
Carry-over (low): Rename structured-data.examples.ts to .tsx or exclude from tsconfig
No blockers requiring Jefe's immediate attention — site is stable but idle; consider planning next content sprint
